ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hourly_metrics" (
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hourly record */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell tower */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metrics */,
  "sms_in" REAL /* Number of incoming SMS messages */,
  "sms_out" REAL /* Number of outgoing SMS messages */,
  "call_in" REAL /* Number of incoming calls */,
  "call_out" REAL /* Number of outgoing calls */,
  "internet_usage" REAL /* Amount of internet data used (in MB) */,
  "avg_signal_strength" REAL /* Average signal strength during the hour */,
  "avg_latency" REAL /* Average latency during the hour */,
  "avg_jitter" REAL /* Average jitter during the hour */,
  "packet_loss_rate" REAL /* Packet loss rate during the hour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hourly_metrics_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cell_towers ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_towers" (
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell tower */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the cell tower */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the cell tower */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the cell tower was installed */,
  "tower_type" TEXT /* Type of cell tower (e.g., macro, micro, femto) */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the cell tower equipment */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_metrics" (
  "day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily record */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell tower */,
  "sms_in_total" REAL /* Total number of incoming SMS messages for the day */,
  "sms_out_total" REAL /* Total number of outgoing SMS messages for the day */,
  "call_in_total" REAL /* Total number of incoming calls for the day */,
  "call_out_total" REAL /* Total number of outgoing calls for the day */,
  "internet_usage_total" REAL /* Total amount of internet data used for the day (in MB) */,
  "avg_signal_strength" REAL /* Average signal strength for the day */,
  "avg_latency" REAL /* Average latency for the day */,
  "avg_jitter" REAL /* Average jitter for the day */,
  "packet_loss_rate" REAL /* Packet loss rate for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_metrics_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cell_towers ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weekly_metrics" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weekly record */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell tower */,
  "sms_in_total" REAL /* Total number of incoming SMS messages for the week */,
  "sms_out_total" REAL /* Total number of outgoing SMS messages for the week */,
  "call_in_total" REAL /* Total number of incoming calls for the week */,
  "call_out_total" REAL /* Total number of outgoing calls for the week */,
  "internet_usage_total" REAL /* Total amount of internet data used for the week (in MB) */,
  "avg_signal_strength" REAL /* Average signal strength for the week */,
  "avg_latency" REAL /* Average latency for the week */,
  "avg_jitter" REAL /* Average jitter for the week */,
  "packet_loss_rate" REAL /* Packet loss rate for the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weekly_metrics_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cell_towers ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_metrics" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monthly record */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell tower */,
  "sms_in_total" REAL /* Total number of incoming SMS messages for the month */,
  "sms_out_total" REAL /* Total number of outgoing SMS messages for the month */,
  "call_in_total" REAL /* Total number of incoming calls for the month */,
  "call_out_total" REAL /* Total number of outgoing calls for the month */,
  "internet_usage_total" REAL /* Total amount of internet data used for the month (in MB) */,
  "avg_signal_strength" REAL /* Average signal strength for the month */,
  "avg_latency" REAL /* Average latency for the month */,
  "avg_jitter" REAL /* Average jitter for the month */,
  "packet_loss_rate" REAL /* Packet loss rate for the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_metrics_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cell_towers ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell tower accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cell_towers ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell tower related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high traffic, equipment failure) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was resolved */,
  "resolved_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cell_towers ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user notified */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, viewed) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, push) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell tower related to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file (in MB) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cell_towers ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_permissions FOREIGN KEY ("permissions") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
